highlights: Export a complete CSV of all VMs in a cloud — vCPU, RAM, storage, tags, and SCVMM custom properties — from the VM Fleet view
Totals row included: vCPU, RAM, and storage summed across the cloud, ready for billing and reporting
Custom property columns get readable names per SCVMM server, so export headers match your own conventions
Org-confined and permission-gated — no new access right needed beyond existing fleet-view access
